characters.description: A returning dimensional mage serving under restrictions as a caravan protector on the journey to Makinaven. Tala relies on extensive bodily inscriptions and has been directed to begin training gravity manipulation, but the caustic bodies of the Leshkin can penetrate defenses that usually keep her safe.
characters.name: Tala

characters.description: The title by which Constructionist Guild members identify Tala after their alarm mistakes her for a concealed threat. Jevin's intervention prevents the restraint from causing serious harm, and the refined Archons acknowledge her recent elevation.
characters.name: Blood Archon

characters.description: Tala's formidable creature companion, capable of obeying her directions and summoning help. His usual physical methods are poorly matched against Leshkin because striking them releases dangerous corrosive sap, placing an unusual limit on how directly he can protect the caravan.
characters.name: Terry

characters.description: Tala's dimensional storage item. It carries her possessions and material recovered from her severed original arm.
characters.name: Kit

characters.description: Tala's existing soul-bound weapon, carried forward from her earlier travels. Its bond to her distinguishes it from ordinary equipment and allows it to serve as her personal blade.
characters.name: Flow

characters.description: The trusted authority who approves work on Tala's complex bodily inscriptions.
characters.name: Holly

characters.description: The caravan's senior protector, route adviser, and principal defensive mage. She teaches Tala how the forest redirects travelers, explains the escalating forms and dangers of the Leshkin, and directs Tala to use the journey to train her new gravity manipulation.
characters.name: Senior mage protector

characters.description: A second mage protector traveling with Tala's caravan and serving as its direct combat specialist. When a predator attacks from the canopy, Tala's first battlefield use of gravity disrupts it long enough for him to deliver the decisive blow.
characters.name: Fellow mage protector

characters.description: A Makinaven practitioner approved by Holly to handle a limited part of Tala's intricate bodily inscriptions. He agrees to restore the offensive activation rings lost with her original arm.
characters.name: Local inscriptionist

characters.description: A paragon and immaterial guide at the Constructionist Guild. Jevin interrupts a Guild restraint that could have harmed Tala, then becomes a measured adviser on magical construction and the hazards of forming a premature bond with Terry.
characters.name: Jevin

characters.description: The leader of the Culinary Guild's public work for a harvest-focused order. She is prepared to arrange the unusually large supply of expedition food Tala needs, although rules governing contact with mages make their wider discussion sensitive.
characters.name: Culinary Guild head

characters.description: A newly raised Archon who arranges extended access to a training arena. He can withstand Terry's rapid attacks and offers Tala a skilled sparring partner at a point when both are developing their abilities.
characters.name: Fellow new Archon

characters.description: A Constructionist Guild representative who evaluates and buys the magical remains from Tala's hunt. Grant combines the purchase with useful equipment and practical information, while showing an interest in the kinds of ventures her unusual abilities might support.
characters.name: Grant

characters.description: A mage with abilities suited to examining possible interference with memory. The investigator compares Tala's recollection with another witness and finds reason to believe her first encounter with a hostile arcane occurred within a human city rather than beyond its protection.
characters.name: Investigating mage

characters.description: An immaterial creator who leads a transport division based on controlled columns of reversed gravity. Her discussion with Tala shows that two practitioners can work with gravity through incompatible magical foundations, limiting which insights they can directly share.
characters.name: Head of gravitational transport
